name: Toki
notes: Great hidden place with awesome coffee and delicious Cortado!

name: Beekend
location: ROF Portico (First Floor-07, ROF Portico, Block C, Sushant Lok Phase I, Sector 43, Gurugram, Haryana 122003)
notes: Cozy Korean cafe with good korean food in aesthetically pleasing setting. Definitely try their Bibimbap.

name: Bawarchi Rolls
notes: The best Chicken roll in the whole world... I've had chicken rolls from hundreds of places, but this is definitely the best one.

name: Malkam Cheruvu
notes: Quiten and clean park with a lake to walk around, may catch a good sunset when not cloudy.

name: Roast 24 Seven
notes: Coffee provided with all popular methods of coffee making, amazing taste.

name: The Coforge Public Library
notes: Well maintained public library with no gadgets, no external books allowed, just sit, read and enjoy silently. No fees required for entering and browsing books, only refundable deposit in case you want to borrow books. Absolutely refreshing as a third place.

name: Broadway The Brewery
notes: Hands down the best brewery of Hyderabad, enjoyed it more for a day time drinking and vibes. You can never go wrong with the food, anything you order will be delicious - highlight-puffpastry base pizza- , needless to say beer is must try.

name: 10 Downing Street
notes: Nice pub with different settings whether you want loud music, quieter seating with a view, rooftop with screening or dance floor room. Experienced staff and food that has never disappointed.

name: Karafa
notes: Both good coffee and good food

name: Archers Coffee
notes: Rated the top 100 roasters in the world. Amazing collection. Also the only place outside India that has Indian coffee beans. (Chikmanglur beans are speciality coffee's best kept secret.)
